planSummary: Define a fake-only, in-memory simulated runtime boundary that processes a simulated dry-run roundtrip and proves by construction that an ALLOW_SIMULATED_DRY_RUN decision can never reach any real executor, provider client, filesystem writer, browser automation adapter, capability unlock executor, public release procedure, or store submission procedure.
implementationLocation: tests/OneBrain.Safety.Tests (safety-only test helper); no product files, no Bridge/CSP, no src product adapters
